payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review). The proposed model stands: OIDC for humans (GitHub/Google/Apple, email+pw fallback) + per-user API keys for machines; JWT access + rotating refresh; project = tenant = sharing+sync boundary; LAN mTLS kept as a separate local trust domain; on-upload authz verifies actor.principal == authenticated subject. The identity decision (principal=human, agent stamps model, '{model} on behalf of {user}') is implemented locally in SCP-128 and proven end-to-end. Child stories SCP-129..133 are the accepted plan. Spike closed; implementation tickets carry the work forward.
